Video.summary: Arena Championship Series East heads to the Heritage Bank Center in Cincinnati, Ohio. Grave Digger’s Weston Anderson continues his dominant sophomore season as Dalton Widner looks to stay red hot in Jurassic Attack while inching closer to the series points lead.
Video.title: Heritage Bank Center - Cincinnati, OH

Video.summary: Eight of the series best compete in ATV's, Speedsters, and Monster Jam trucks.
Video.title: Vivint Smart Home Arena - Salt Lake City, UT

Image.alt: Vivint Smart Home Arena - Salt Lake City, UT
Vivint Smart Home Arena - Salt Lake City, UT
Vivint Smart Home Arena - Salt Lake City, UT

Video.summary: Stadium Championship Series Red returns to Tampa with more action from Raymond James Stadium as Grave Digger’s Adam Anderson attempts to win back-to-back Overall Event Championships and Bakugan Dragonoid’s Camden Murphy looks to extend the series points lead.
Video.title: Raymond James Stadium - Tampa, FL

Video.summary: The home of Arizona's Diamondbacks is made completely over for the exciting freestyle action from Monster Jam in Phoenix, AZ, on January 27, 2007.
Video.title: Chase Field - Phoenix, AZ - Freestyle

Video.summary: Monster Jam's 2021 season bounces into Tampa for more racing and freestyle action from Raymond James Stadium on March 12, 2021.
Video.title: Raymond James Stadium - Tampa, FL

Video.summary: Day 3 of the Monster Jam 2021 Stadium Championship Series continues at Camping World Stadium, in Orlando, FL.
Video.title: Camping World Stadium - Orlando, FL

Video.summary: Don't miss the thrills of Monster Jam freestyle action from the Georgia Dome on January 14, 2012.
Video.title: Georgia Dome - Atlanta, GA - Freestyle

Video.summary: Check out the fun freestyle action from Orlando Citrus Bowl, on January 29, 2011.
Video.title: Citrus Bowl - Orlando, FL - Freestyle

Video.summary: Stadium Championship Series Blue returns to Anaheim as Son Uva Digger’s Ryan Anderson looks to continue his historic run in Orange County. Can he win his 7th event championship in three years or will Tyler Menninga break the Anaheim curse that has plagued his otherwise stellar Monster Jam career.
Video.title: Angel Stadium - Anaheim, CA

Video.summary: Check out all the Racing and Freestyle action from Lucas Oil Stadium on January 29, 2015.
Video.title: Lucas Oil Stadium - Indianapolis, IN

Video.summary: Check out all the Monster Jam racing action from Minneapolis, MN, on December 8, 2007!
Video.title: HHH Metrodome - Minneapolis, MN - Racing

Video.summary: Everything's bigger in Texas- and that includes the superstars of Monster Jam! It's time for big-time carnage during freestyle action from the Astrodome in Houston!
Video.title: Astrodome - Houston, TX - Freestyle

Video.summary: On March 14, 2021, Monster Jam's 2021 season continues with even more excitement at Raymond James Stadium.
Video.title: Raymond James Stadium - Tampa, FL

Video.summary: Monster Jam’s 2022 season continues with round 6 of the Stadium Championship Series, in The Dome at America's Center in St. Louis, MO.
Video.title: The Dome at America's Center - St. Louis, MO

Image.alt: The Dome at America's Center - St. Louis, MO
The Dome at America's Center - St. Louis, MO
The Dome at America's Center - St. Louis, MO

Video.summary: Pontiac Silverdome hosts Monster Jam one last time before it gets destroyed with bombastic racing action on January 7, 2006.
Video.title: Silverdome - Pontiac, MI - Racing

Video.summary: On June 20, 2015, Monster Jam trucks competed in freestyle action at Gillette Stadium!
Video.title: Gillette Stadium - Foxborough, MA - Freestyle

Video.summary: Freestyling Monster Trucks kick it into high gear during this epic show at the Astrodome in Houston, TX.
Video.title: Astrodome - Houston, TX - Freestyle

Video.summary: All the racing and freestyle action from EverBank Field, on March 3, 2012.
Video.title: EverBank Field - Jacksonville, FL

Video.summary: Absolutely don't miss all the awesome racing action from Jacksonville Municipal Stadium, on February 27, 2010.
Video.title: EverBank Field - Jacksonville, FL - Racing

Video.summary: Monster Jam races into the HHH Metrodome, on November 13, 2010 with epic racing excitement!
Video.title: Metrodome - Minneapolis, MN - Racing

Video.summary: Monster Jam's 2022 season round 25 of the World Finals at Camping World Stadium, Orlando, FL.
Video.title: World finals XXI - Camping World Stadium - Orlando, FL

Image.alt: World finals XXI - Camping World Stadium - Orlando, FL
World finals XXI - Camping World Stadium - Orlando, FL
World finals XXI - Camping World Stadium - Orlando, FL

Video.summary: Monster Jam Trucks qualify for Monster Jam World Finals XX racing action at Camping World Stadium.
Video.title: World Finals XX - Camping World Stadium - Orlando, FL - Qualifying

Image.alt: World Finals XX - Camping World Stadium - Orlando, FL - Qualifying
World Finals XX - Camping World Stadium - Orlando, FL - Qualifying
World Finals XX - Camping World Stadium - Orlando, FL - Qualifying

Video.summary: It's time for Monster Jam World Finals X! Buckle in for the racing action on March 28, 2009 in Las Vegas.
Video.title: World Finals X - Sam Boyd Stadium - Las Vegas, NV - Racing

Image.alt: World Finals X - Sam Boyd Stadium - Las Vegas, NV - Racing
World Finals X - Sam Boyd Stadium - Las Vegas, NV - Racing
World Finals X - Sam Boyd Stadium - Las Vegas, NV - Racing

Video.summary: Recorded LIVE from Sam Boyd Stadium, all of your favorite trucks and drivers compete with freestyle action from Monster Jam World Finals 5 on March 20, 2004.
Video.title: World Finals V - Sam Boyd Stadium - Las Vegas, NV - Freestyle

Image.alt: World Finals V - Sam Boyd Stadium - Las Vegas, NV - Freestyle
World Finals V - Sam Boyd Stadium - Las Vegas, NV - Freestyle
World Finals V - Sam Boyd Stadium - Las Vegas, NV - Freestyle

Video.summary: It all comes down to this: it's the 2025 World Finals in Salt Lake City, Utah
Video.title: Rice-Eccles Stadium - Salt Lake City, UT - World Finals XXIIII - Day 1

Image.alt: Rice-Eccles Stadium - Salt Lake City, UT - World Finals XXIIII - Day 1
Rice-Eccles Stadium - Salt Lake City, UT - World Finals XXIIII - Day 1
Rice-Eccles Stadium - Salt Lake City, UT - World Finals XXIIII - Day 1

Video.summary: Buckle up, Baltimore! The Arena Championship Series East is taking over the CFG Bank Arena for a night of pure, unadulterated horsepower. This isn't just a show; it's a high-stakes battle where 12,000-pound behemoths defy gravity and legendary rivalries—like father versus son and brother versus brother—push every driver to the absolute edge.
Video.title: CFG Bank Arena - Baltimore, MD

Video.summary: The dirt is ready and the engines are roaring as Monster Jam takes over loanDepot park in Miami for a high-stakes Round 8. Witness the raw power and fearless competition of the Stadium Championship Series East as drivers battle across three intense stages: JCB Racing, the Skills Challenge, and Freestyle. Rivals like Adam Anderson and Tristan England look to defend their dominance, while fierce competitors like Jamie Sullivan and Chris Koehler push their 1,500-horsepower machines to the absolute edge to claim the BKT overall event championship. Don't miss a second of the gravity-defying stunts and heart-pounding action in this electric stadium environment.
Video.title: loanDepot Park - Miami, FL

Video.summary: Arena Championship Series Central heads to New York as the series points battle continues at UBS Arena in Belmont Park. Scooby Doo’s Brianna Mahon and El Toro Loco’s Fernando Martinez attempt to chip away at the points lead held by Grave Digger’s Weston Anderson. The second-generation Grave Digger driver looks for his series-leading 17th event win.
Video.title: UBS Arena - Belmont Park, NY

Video.summary: Arena in 30 returns to The Vivint Arena in Salt Lake City, UT. Reigning Series Champion, Krysten Anderson, tries to lead Grave Digger to the Arena Championship Series West Overall Event Championship. It will be a tough dirt road as she’ll have to surpass superstars like Tristan England, and Elvis Lainez.
Video.title: Vivint Arena - Salt Lake City, UT

Image.alt: Vivint Arena - Salt Lake City, UT
Vivint Arena - Salt Lake City, UT
Vivint Arena - Salt Lake City, UT

Video.summary: In an epic series finale, Arena Championship Series West heads to the Vibrant Arena in Moline, Illinois as Krysten Anderson looks to lead Grave Digger to the Overall Event Championship in one last thrilling showdown with El Toro Loco’s Elvis Lainez.
Video.title: Vibrant Arena - Moline, IL
